passage_title: Motivational factors and the hospitality industry

sentences.sentence: A critical ingredient in the success of hotels is developing and maintaining superior performance from their employees.
sentences.translation: 酒店成功的一个关键因素，是让员工形成并保持卓越表现。

structure.text: A critical ingredient in the success of hotels
developing and maintaining superior performance from their employees

difficult_points: 主语中心词是 ingredient，后面的 in the success of hotels 限定它属于“酒店成功”的因素。
developing and maintaining 是并列动名词，整体作表语说明这个关键因素是什么。
from their employees 表示绩效的来源，即来自员工的表现。

sentences.sentence: How is that accomplished?
sentences.translation: 这要如何实现呢？
difficult_points: that 回指上一句中“让员工形成并保持卓越表现”这一目标。
is accomplished 是被动语态，强调目标被实现的方式而非执行者。

sentences.sentence: What Human Resource Management (HRM) practices should organizations invest in to acquire and retain great employees?
sentences.translation: 组织应该投资哪些人力资源管理（HRM）实践，来获得并留住优秀员工呢？

structure.text: to acquire and retain great employees

difficult_points: What... practices 是被提前的宾语，真正搭配的是 invest in practices。
should 表示建议或应当采取的做法。
to acquire and retain great employees 是目的状语，说明投资这些实践的目的。

sentences.sentence: Some hotels aim to provide superior working conditions for their employees.
sentences.translation: 一些酒店旨在为员工提供更优越的工作条件。

structure.text: to provide superior working conditions for their employees

difficult_points: aim 后接不定式，表示酒店采取行动的目标。
superior working conditions 是 provide 的宾语，for their employees 说明受益对象。

sentences.sentence: The idea originated from workplaces usually in the non-service sector—that emphasized fun and enjoyment as part of work-life balance.
sentences.translation: 这一理念源自通常位于非服务行业的工作场所——这些场所强调把乐趣和愉悦作为工作与生活平衡的一部分。

structure.text: that emphasized fun and enjoyment as part of work-life balance

difficult_points: originated from 表示理念的来源，不是某个具体行动的起点。
usually in the non-service sector 后置修饰 workplaces，说明这些工作场所通常所属行业。
破折号后的 that 从句继续限定 workplaces，说明这些场所强调什么。

sentences.sentence: By contrast, the service sector, and more specifically hotels, has traditionally not extended these practices to address basic employee needs, such as good working conditions.
sentences.translation: 相比之下，服务行业，更具体地说是酒店，传统上并未把这些做法扩展到满足员工基本需求上，例如良好的工作条件。

structure.text: the service sector, and more specifically hotels
has traditionally not extended these practices

difficult_points: and more specifically hotels 是插入说明，把 service sector 的范围进一步缩小到酒店。
has traditionally not extended 使用现在完成时，强调这种做法长期以来没有被采用。
to address basic employee needs 表示这些 practices 本应服务的目的。

sentences.sentence: Pfeffer (1994) emphasizes that in order to succeed in a global business environment, organizations must make investment in Human Resource Management (HRM) to allow them to acquire employees who possess better skills and capabilities than their competitors.
sentences.translation: Pfeffer（1994）强调，为了在全球商业环境中取得成功，组织必须投资于人力资源管理（HRM），使其能够获得技能和能力优于竞争对手的员工。

structure.text: that in order to succeed in a global business environment, organizations must make investment in Human Resource Management (HRM) to allow them to acquire employees who possess better skills and capabilities than their competitors
in order to succeed in a global business environment
who possess better skills and capabilities than their competitors

difficult_points: that 引导 emphasizes 的宾语从句，核心结论是 organizations must make investment。
in order to succeed... 是目的结构，放在从句前部说明投资 HRM 的大背景。
to allow them to acquire employees 是结果或目的，其中 them 指代 organizations。
who possess... 是定语从句，修饰 employees。

sentences.sentence: This investment will be to their competitive advantage.
sentences.translation: 这种投资将成为他们的竞争优势。
difficult_points: This investment 回指上一句中对 HRM 的投入。
will be to their competitive advantage 表示“会对其竞争优势有利”，不是地点意义的 to。

sentences.sentence: Despite this recognition of the importance of employee development, the hospitality industry has historically been dominated by underdeveloped HR practices (Lucas, 2002).
sentences.translation: 尽管人们认识到了员工发展的重要性，但酒店餐饮服务业在历史上一直由不成熟的人力资源实践所主导（Lucas，2002）。

structure.text: Despite this recognition of the importance of employee development

difficult_points: Despite 引导让步介词短语，表示后文情况与前文认识形成反差。
has historically been dominated 是现在完成时的被动语态，强调历史延续性。
by underdeveloped HR practices 说明主导这一行业的是不成熟的人力资源实践。

expressions.meaning_zh: 不成熟的人力资源实践

sentences.sentence: Lucas also points out that 'the substance of HRM practices does not appear to be designed to foster constructive relations with employees or to represent a managerial approach that enables developing and drawing out the full potential of people, even though employees may be broadly satisfied with many aspects of their work' (Lucas, 2002).
sentences.translation: Lucas 还指出，“人力资源管理实践的实质似乎并不是为了与员工建立建设性关系，也不是为了代表一种能够开发和激发人们全部潜能的管理方式，尽管员工可能对其工作的许多方面总体满意”（Lucas，2002）。

structure.text: that 'the substance of HRM practices does not appear to be designed to foster constructive relations with employees or to represent a managerial approach that enables developing and drawing out the full potential of people, even though employees may be broadly satisfied with many aspects of their work' (Lucas, 2002)
to foster constructive relations with employees or to represent a managerial approach
that enables developing and drawing out the full potential of people
even though employees may be broadly satisfied with many aspects of their work

difficult_points: points out 后接 that 引导的宾语从句，宾语从句内部是一段直接引语。
does not appear to be designed to... 表示“似乎并非被设计来……”，语气比直接否定更委婉。
to foster... 与 to represent... 并列，说明这些 HRM practices 没有实现的两个目标。
even though 引导让步从句，说明员工表面满意并不等于 HRM 实践有效。

sentences.sentence: In addition, or maybe as a result, high employee turnover has been a recurring problem throughout the hospitality industry.
sentences.translation: 此外，或许也正因如此，高员工流失率一直是整个酒店餐饮服务业反复出现的问题。

structure.text: In addition, or maybe as a result

difficult_points: In addition 与 as a result 同时出现，表示这既是补充信息，也可能是前述问题的结果。
has been 使用现在完成时，强调高流失率从过去持续到现在。
throughout the hospitality industry 扩大范围，说明这是全行业问题。

sentences.sentence: Among the many cited reasons are low compensation, inadequate benefits, poor working conditions and compromised employee morale and attitudes (Maroudas et al., 2008).
sentences.translation: 在众多被引用的原因中，包括低薪酬、福利不足、工作条件差，以及受损的员工士气和态度（Maroudas 等，2008）。

structure.text: low compensation, inadequate benefits, poor working conditions and compromised employee morale and attitudes

difficult_points: 句首 Among... 触发倒装，真正的主语是 are 后面的一串原因。
cited 是过去分词，修饰 reasons，表示“被提及的”。
compromised 在此表示“受损的”，修饰 employee morale and attitudes。

expressions.meaning_zh: 在众多被提及的原因中

sentences.sentence: Ng and Sorensen (2008) demonstrated that when managers provide recognition to employees, motivate employees to work together, and remove obstacles preventing effective performance, employees feel more obligated to stay with the company.
sentences.translation: Ng 和 Sorensen（2008）证明，当管理者认可员工、激励员工共同工作，并清除阻碍有效表现的障碍时，员工会更觉得自己有义务留在公司。

structure.text: that when managers provide recognition to employees, motivate employees to work together, and remove obstacles preventing effective performance, employees feel more obligated to stay with the company
when managers provide recognition to employees, motivate employees to work together, and remove obstacles preventing effective performance
employees feel more obligated to stay with the company

difficult_points: demonstrated 后的 that 从句呈现研究结论。
when 从句中 provide、motivate、remove 三个动作并列，都是 managers 的行为。
preventing effective performance 是现在分词短语，后置修饰 obstacles。
to stay with the company 是 obligated 后的补足语，说明员工觉得有义务做什么。

sentences.sentence: This was succinctly summarized by Michel et al. (2013): '[P]roviding support to employees gives them the confidence to perform their jobs better and the motivation to stay with the organization.'
sentences.translation: Michel 等人（2013）对此作了简洁总结：“为员工提供支持会给予他们把工作做得更好的信心，以及留在组织中的动力。”

structure.text: '[P]roviding support to employees gives them the confidence to perform their jobs better and the motivation to stay with the organization.'

difficult_points: This 回指上一句 Ng and Sorensen 的研究结论。
was succinctly summarized 是被动语态，by 短语指出总结者。
引号内 [P]roviding 是动名词短语作主语，gives 是谓语。
the confidence... and the motivation... 是并列宾语，分别由两个不定式补充说明。

sentences.sentence: Hospitality organizations can therefore enhance employee motivation and retention through the development and improvement of their working conditions.
sentences.translation: 因此，酒店餐饮服务组织可以通过发展和改善工作条件来提升员工积极性并留住员工。

structure.text: through the development and improvement of their working conditions

difficult_points: therefore 承接前面关于支持员工的研究，推出管理启示。
employee motivation and retention 是并列名词结构，表示提升积极性与留住员工两个目标。
through... 表示实现这些目标的手段。

expressions.text: through the development and improvement of

sentences.sentence: These conditions are inherently linked to the working environment.
sentences.translation: 这些条件与工作环境有着内在联系。
difficult_points: These conditions 回指上一句中的 working conditions。
are linked to 是被动形式的固定搭配，表示“与……相关”。
inherently 强调这种联系是内在的而非偶然的。

sentences.sentence: While it seems likely that employees' reactions to their job characteristics could be affected by a predisposition to view their work environment negatively, no evidence exists to support this hypothesis (Spector et al., 2000).
sentences.translation: 虽然员工对其工作特征的反应似乎可能会受到一种消极看待工作环境的倾向影响，但没有证据支持这一假设（Spector 等，2000）。

structure.text: While it seems likely that employees' reactions to their job characteristics could be affected by a predisposition to view their work environment negatively
that employees' reactions to their job characteristics could be affected by a predisposition to view their work environment negatively
to view their work environment negatively

difficult_points: While 引导让步从句，先承认一种可能性，再用主句否定证据支持。
it seems likely 中 it 是形式主语，真正内容由 that 从句说明。
could be affected 是情态动词加被动语态，表示可能受到影响。
to view their work environment negatively 后置修饰 predisposition，说明倾向的内容。

sentences.sentence: However, given the opportunity, many people will find something to complain about in relation to their workplace (Poulston, 2009).
sentences.translation: 然而，只要有机会，许多人都会找到与其工作场所有关的抱怨对象（Poulston，2009）。

structure.text: to complain about in relation to their workplace

difficult_points: given the opportunity 是省略条件结构，可理解为“如果有机会”。
to complain about 后置修饰 something，about 的宾语是 something。
in relation to their workplace 限定抱怨内容与工作场所有关。

sentences.sentence: There is a strong link between the perceptions of employees and particular factors of their work environment that are separate from the work itself, including company policies, salary and vacations.
sentences.translation: 员工的看法与其工作环境中的某些因素之间存在紧密联系，而这些因素独立于工作本身，包括公司政策、薪资和假期。

structure.text: a strong link between the perceptions of employees and particular factors of their work environment
that are separate from the work itself
including company policies, salary and vacations

difficult_points: There is 是存在句，真正的新信息是 a strong link...。
between A and B 连接两个对象：employees 的 perceptions 与 work environment 的 factors。
that are separate from the work itself 修饰 factors，说明这些因素不属于工作本身。
including... 举例说明 particular factors 包括哪些内容。

sentences.sentence: Such conditions are particularly troubling for the luxury hotel market, where high-quality service, requiring a sophisticated approach to HRM, is recognized as a critical source of competitive advantage (Maroudas et al., 2008).
sentences.translation: 这些状况对豪华酒店市场尤其令人担忧，因为在该市场中，高质量服务被视为竞争优势的关键来源，而这需要成熟的人力资源管理方法（Maroudas 等，2008）。

structure.text: where high-quality service, requiring a sophisticated approach to HRM, is recognized as a critical source of competitive advantage
requiring a sophisticated approach to HRM

difficult_points: Such conditions 回指前文中员工工作环境和待遇方面的问题。
where 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 luxury hotel market 的特点。
requiring... 是现在分词插入结构，说明 high-quality service 对 HRM 的要求。
is recognized as 是被动表达，表示高质量服务被公认为竞争优势来源。

expressions.text: a critical source of competitive advantage

sentences.sentence: In a real sense, the services of hotel employees represent their industry (Schneider and Bowen, 1993).
sentences.translation: 从真实意义上说，酒店员工提供的服务代表着他们所在的行业（Schneider 和 Bowen，1993）。
difficult_points: In a real sense 表示作者强调这一判断并非夸张说法。
the services of hotel employees 是主语，中心词是 services。
their 指代 hotel employees，their industry 即员工所在的酒店行业。

sentences.sentence: This representation has commonly been limited to guest experiences.
sentences.translation: 这种代表性通常被局限于客人的体验。
difficult_points: This representation 回指上一句“员工服务代表行业”的说法。
has been limited 是现在完成时的被动语态，表示长期以来被限制在某一范围。
to guest experiences 说明这种理解只关注客人体验。

sentences.sentence: This suggests that there has been a dichotomy between the guest environment provided in luxury hotels and the working conditions of their employees.
sentences.translation: 这表明，豪华酒店为客人提供的环境与其员工的工作条件之间一直存在一种割裂。

structure.text: that there has been a dichotomy between the guest environment provided in luxury hotels and the working conditions of their employees

difficult_points: This 指代前文只关注 guest experiences 的情况。
there has been 是存在句的现在完成时，强调这种 dichotomy 一直存在。
between... and... 把 guest environment 与 working conditions 进行对照。
provided in luxury hotels 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 guest environment。

sentences.sentence: It is therefore essential for hotel management to develop HRM practices that enable them to inspire and retain competent employees.
sentences.translation: 因此，酒店管理层必须发展人力资源管理实践，使他们能够激励并留住有能力的员工。

structure.text: that enable them to inspire and retain competent employees
to inspire and retain competent employees

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正的主语是 to develop HRM practices。
therefore 承接前文问题，提出管理上的必要行动。
that enable them... 修饰 HRM practices，说明这些实践应具备的功能。
them 指代 hotel management，而 competent employees 是 inspire and retain 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: This requires an understanding of what motivates employees at different levels of management and different stages of their careers (Enz and Siguaw, 2000).
sentences.translation: 这需要理解在不同管理层级和不同职业阶段，什么因素会激励员工（Enz 和 Siguaw，2000）。

structure.text: an understanding of what motivates employees at different levels of management and different stages of their careers
what motivates employees at different levels of management and different stages of their careers

difficult_points: This 回指上一句中发展有效 HRM practices 的任务。
of 后接 what 引导的宾语从句，说明需要理解的具体内容。
at different levels... and different stages... 并列，分别指管理层级和职业阶段。

sentences.sentence: This implies that it is beneficial for hotel managers to understand what practices are most favorable to increase employee satisfaction and retention.
sentences.translation: 这意味着，酒店经理了解哪些做法最有利于提高员工满意度和留任率，是有益的。

structure.text: that it is beneficial for hotel managers to understand what practices are most favorable to increase employee satisfaction and retention
it is beneficial for hotel managers
to understand what practices are most favorable to increase employee satisfaction and retention
what practices are most favorable to increase employee satisfaction and retention

difficult_points: implies 后接 that 从句，表示由前一句推导出的管理启示。
it is beneficial for... to... 中 it 是形式主语，真正主语是不定式。
what practices are most favorable... 是 understand 的宾语从句。
to increase employee satisfaction and retention 表示这些 practices 有利于实现的结果。

sentences.sentence: Herzberg (1966) proposes that people have two major types of needs, the first being extrinsic motivation factors relating to the context in which work is performed, rather than the work itself.
sentences.translation: Herzberg（1966）提出，人有两大类需求，第一类是外在激励因素，它们与工作开展的情境相关，而不是与工作本身相关。

structure.text: that people have two major types of needs
the first being extrinsic motivation factors relating to the context in which work is performed
relating to the context in which work is performed

difficult_points: proposes 后的 that 从句提出理论核心：people have two major types of needs。
the first being... 是独立主格结构，对 two major types 中的第一类作补充说明。
relating to... 后置修饰 extrinsic motivation factors。
in which work is performed 是定语从句，修饰 context。

sentences.sentence: These include working conditions and job security.
sentences.translation: 这些因素包括工作条件和工作保障。
difficult_points: These 指代上一句中的 extrinsic motivation factors。
working conditions and job security 是 include 的并列宾语，举例说明外在因素。

sentences.sentence: When these factors are unfavorable, job dissatisfaction may result.
sentences.translation: 当这些因素不利时，工作不满可能就会产生。
difficult_points: When 引导条件或时间状语从句，说明工作不满出现的条件。
these factors 继续指代外在激励因素，如工作条件和工作保障。
may result 中 result 是不及物动词，表示“产生”。

sentences.sentence: Significantly, though, just fulfilling these needs does not result in satisfaction, but only in the reduction of dissatisfaction (Maroudas et al., 2008).
sentences.translation: 不过，重要的是，仅仅满足这些需求并不会带来满意，而只是减少不满（Maroudas 等，2008）。

structure.text: but only in the reduction of dissatisfaction

difficult_points: Significantly, though 是插入式连接成分，提醒读者后文是关键转折。
just fulfilling these needs 是动名词短语作主语。
does not result in... but only in... 表示并非导致满意，而只是减少不满。
reduction of dissatisfaction 与 satisfaction 形成理论上的区分。

sentences.sentence: Employees also have intrinsic motivation needs or motivators, which include such factors as achievement and recognition.
sentences.translation: 员工也有内在激励需求或激励因素，其中包括成就和认可等因素。

structure.text: which include such factors as achievement and recognition

difficult_points: also 表明本句是在上一段外在需求之外补充第二类需求。
intrinsic motivation needs or motivators 中 or 表示近似解释关系。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 motivators 包括哪些因素。

sentences.sentence: Unlike extrinsic factors, motivator factors may ideally result in job satisfaction (Maroudas et al., 2008).
sentences.translation: 不同于外在因素，激励因素在理想情况下可能带来工作满意度（Maroudas 等，2008）。
difficult_points: Unlike extrinsic factors 引出与上一段外在因素的对比。
may ideally result in 中 may 表示可能性，ideally 表示理想条件下。
result in job satisfaction 与上一句 dissatisfaction 的减少形成区别。

sentences.sentence: Herzberg's (1966) theory discusses the need for a 'balance' of these two types of needs.
sentences.translation: Herzberg（1966）的理论讨论了在这两类需求之间取得“平衡”的必要性。

structure.text: the need for a 'balance' of these two types of needs
of these two types of needs

difficult_points: the need for... 表示“对……的需要”，不是动词 need。
a 'balance' of these two types of needs 指外在需求与内在需求之间的平衡。
引号中的 'balance' 强调这是理论中的核心概念。

sentences.sentence: The impact of fun as a motivating factor at work has also been explored.
sentences.translation: 人们也探讨过乐趣作为工作中激励因素所产生的影响。

structure.text: The impact of fun as a motivating factor at work
of fun as a motivating factor at work

difficult_points: 主语中心词是 impact，后面的 of fun... 说明是什么影响。
as a motivating factor at work 说明 fun 在工作中的功能。
has been explored 是现在完成时被动语态，表示已有研究对此进行探讨。

sentences.sentence: For example, Tews, Michel and Stafford (2013) conducted a study focusing on staff from a chain of themed restaurants in the United States.
sentences.translation: 例如，Tews、Michel 和 Stafford（2013）开展了一项研究，聚焦于美国一家主题餐厅连锁店的员工。

structure.text: focusing on staff from a chain of themed restaurants in the United States

difficult_points: For example 表明本句用具体研究支撑上一句观点。
focusing on... 是现在分词短语，后置修饰 a study。
from a chain of themed restaurants in the United States 说明研究对象的来源。

sentences.sentence: It was found that fun activities had a favorable impact on performance and manager support for fun had a favorable impact in reducing turnover.
sentences.translation: 研究发现，趣味活动对绩效产生了积极影响，而管理者对趣味活动的支持也对减少员工流失产生了积极影响。

structure.text: that fun activities had a favorable impact on performance and manager support for fun had a favorable impact in reducing turnover
fun activities had a favorable impact on performance
manager support for fun had a favorable impact in reducing turnover

difficult_points: It was found 是被动引出研究发现，真正内容在 that 从句中。
that 从句中有两个并列分句，共同说明 fun 的效果。
had a favorable impact on 与 had a favorable impact in 分别搭配 performance 和 reducing turnover。
reducing turnover 是动名词短语，作介词 in 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: Their findings support the view that fun may indeed have a beneficial effect, but the framing of that fun must be carefully aligned with both organizational goals and employee characteristics.
sentences.translation: 他们的研究结果支持这样一种观点：趣味确实可能产生有益效果，但这种趣味活动的设计必须谨慎地与组织目标和员工特征保持一致。

structure.text: the view that fun may indeed have a beneficial effect
that fun may indeed have a beneficial effect
but the framing of that fun must be carefully aligned with both organizational goals and employee characteristics

difficult_points: that fun may indeed have a beneficial effect 是同位语从句，解释 the view 的内容。
but 连接两个转折关系的分句：有益效果存在，但需要正确设计。
the framing of that fun 指趣味活动的组织方式或框架。
must be carefully aligned with 是被动结构，表示必须与两个方面保持一致。

sentences.sentence: 'Managers must learn how to achieve the delicate balance of allowing employees the freedom to enjoy themselves at work while simultaneously maintaining high levels of performance' (Tews et al., 2013).
sentences.translation: “管理者必须学会如何实现一种微妙的平衡：既允许员工在工作中享受自由和乐趣，同时又保持高水平的绩效”（Tews 等，2013）。

structure.text: how to achieve the delicate balance of allowing employees the freedom to enjoy themselves at work while simultaneously maintaining high levels of performance
of allowing employees the freedom to enjoy themselves at work
while simultaneously maintaining high levels of performance

difficult_points: how to achieve... 是 learn 的宾语，表示管理者要学会的内容。
the delicate balance of... 中 of 后说明这种平衡具体涉及什么。
allowing employees the freedom to enjoy themselves at work 是动名词结构，说明平衡的一端。
while simultaneously maintaining... 表示另一端要求，即同时保持绩效水平。

sentences.sentence: Deery (2008) has recommended several actions that can be adopted at the organizational level to retain good staff as well as assist in balancing work and family life.
sentences.translation: Deery（2008）建议了若干可以在组织层面采用的行动，以留住优秀员工，同时帮助平衡工作与家庭生活。

structure.text: that can be adopted at the organizational level
to retain good staff as well as assist in balancing work and family life

difficult_points: has recommended 是现在完成时，表示 Deery 的建议对当前讨论仍有意义。
that can be adopted... 是定语从句，修饰 actions。
to retain good staff as well as assist... 表示这些行动的两个目的。
as well as 连接 retain 与 assist 两个动词结构。

sentences.sentence: Those particularly appropriate to the hospitality industry include allowing adequate breaks during the working day, staff functions that involve families, and providing health and well-being opportunities.
sentences.translation: 其中尤其适合酒店餐饮服务业的措施包括：在工作日中允许足够的休息、举办让家人参与的员工活动，以及提供健康和福祉机会。

structure.text: Those particularly appropriate to the hospitality industry
particularly appropriate to the hospitality industry
allowing adequate breaks during the working day, staff functions that involve families, and providing health and well-being opportunities

difficult_points: Those 指代上一句中的 several actions。
particularly appropriate to the hospitality industry 后置修饰 Those，说明这些行动特别适合的行业。
include 后接三个并列内容：allowing、staff functions 和 providing。
that involve families 是定语从句，修饰 staff functions。
